summary: Tested No-Show Analytics feature and No-Show Reason selection. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - analytics page renders correctly with all components. Navigation from sidebar works.
features_tested: GET /api/pms/no-show-analytics returns analytics data with daily, by_room_type, by_channel, by_reason fields
POST /api/pms/bookings/no-show-virtual accepts no_show_reason field (misafir_gelmedi, iptal_gec_islendi, overbooking)
No-Show Analytics page (/no-show-analytics) renders with summary cards (total no-shows, revenue loss, daily avg, per no-show avg)
No-Show Analytics page shows reason breakdown, room type breakdown, channel breakdown charts
No-Show Analytics page shows daily trend chart and recent records table
Navigation to No-Show Analytics works from sidebar under Reservations group (Rezervasyon > No-Show Analitik)

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw text (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue from iteration 170

test_results.test_no_show_analytics_by_reason_structu: PASSED - reason, label, count fields present
test_results.test_no_show_analytics_by_room_type_stru: PASSED - room_type, count, revenue_loss fields present
test_results.test_no_show_analytics_by_channel_struct: PASSED - channel, count, revenue_loss fields present

frontend_test_results.noshow_analytics_page_loads: PASSED - Page renders with all components
frontend_test_results.summary_cards_display: PASSED - 4 summary cards visible (total, revenue loss, daily avg, per no-show avg)
frontend_test_results.breakdown_charts_display: PASSED - Reason, room type, channel, daily trend charts visible
frontend_test_results.recent_records_table: PASSED - Table shows guest name, room type, channel, reason, amount
frontend_test_results.navigation_from_sidebar: PASSED - Rezervasyon > No-Show Analitik navigates correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All existing no-shows have no_show_reason as null/belirtilmemis since this field was just added - this is expected behavior
No-Show reason dialog in calendar only appears when there are unassigned bookings (currently 0 unassigned bookings in system)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_noshow_analytics_api.py - Created new test file for no-show analytics
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 25 no-show records in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: No-Show Analytics feature is fully functional. 25 no-shows exist in DB with total 7,500 TL revenue loss. All existing no-shows have no_show_reason as 'belirtilmemis' (not specified) since the reason field was just added. The No-Show reason dialog in calendar only appears when clicking No-Show button on unassigned bookings - currently there are 0 unassigned bookings in the system. Navigation: Rezervasyon dropdown > No-Show Analitik.

notes.no_show_reason_dialog_not_tested: Could not test the No-Show reason dialog UI because there are currently 0 unassigned bookings in the system. The dialog code exists in ReservationCalendar.jsx (lines 1013-1055) with data-testid='noshow-reason-dialog' and 'noshow-reason-select'. The backend endpoint correctly accepts all 3 reason values.
